assumptions.title: Test Framework
assumptions.default: Use Jest with supertest (already in devDependencies)

assumptions.title: Single-File Skill Structure
assumptions.default: Implement as a single SKILL.md file

assumptions.title: Model Selection
assumptions.default: Use sonnet as the execution model

decisions.title: Test Scope — Which Endpoints
decisions.context: 42 documented endpoints + ~6 undocumented admin routes. OpenAPI spec covers the 42.

decisions.title: External Service Mocking Strategy
decisions.context: 3 external dependencies: payment processor, email service, search index.
decisions.user_input: Use msw for email and search, but use a real Stripe test-mode instance for payment since Stripe has a robust test API

decisions.title: Database Strategy
decisions.context: No test database seeding currently. 340 transitive deps in full tree.
options: C: Shared test DB with transaction rollback

decisions.title: Auth Token Management
decisions.context: Auth middleware uses JWT with refresh tokens. Integration tests need token management.
options: B: Full auth flow per test

decisions.title: Test Organization
decisions.context: 14 route files in src/api/routes/. Need to organize test files.
options: A: One test file per route file — 14 files (recommended)

decisions.title: Response Validation Depth
decisions.context: OpenAPI 3.0 spec available for response shape validation.
options: A: Schema validation + key field assertions (recommended)

decisions.title: Error Case Coverage
decisions.context: Error handling is where most integration bugs hide.
options: A: All documented error codes per endpoint (recommended)

decisions.title: Rate Limiting Test Approach
decisions.context: Rate limiting is per-IP in production. Needs different handling in tests.
options: A: Configurable rate limits in test env (recommended)

decisions.title: Test Data Seeding Strategy
decisions.context: No existing seeding. Tests currently use mocked data stores.
options: A: Fixture files per test suite (recommended)
B: Factory functions with random data

decisions.title: CI Integration
decisions.context: Integration tests are slower than unit tests. Need CI strategy.
options: A: Separate CI job — run on PR (recommended)
